THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HADDOW, IAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NIEMANN, DAVID KAIMI $4,655.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,779.12 INTEREST, $121.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,556.07, DEFENDANT DAVID KAIMI NIEMANN NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

ORDER REGARDING DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE, FILED. REQUEST DENIED. PER ORDER, REQUEST WAS NOT FILED AT LEAST 10 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING DATE AND GOOD CAUSE WAS NOT SHOWN FOR THE LATE REQUEST. THE DEFENDANT HAS RECEIVED PREVIOUS CONTINUANCES AND WAS GRANTED LEAVE TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE BUT HAS NOT DONE SO.
